proposed_title: Alzheimer's Disease Biomarker Study — APOE Genotype vs. Cognitive Impairment (Sex-Stratified)
encoding_note: Class == 'Impaired' counts as Success (1), 'Control' as 0. Treatment = Genotype (6 APOE allele combinations: E2E2, E2E3, E2E4, E3E3, E3E4, E4E4). Stratum = male (0/1). Aggregate to count of Impaired and total Cases per (Genotype × male) cell. Note: some genotype-sex cells may be sparse; consider collapsing to E4-carrier vs. non-carrier if needed.
